历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 2787 → 3103 → 2643 → 2448 → 1635, showing a fluctuating but overall forward-moving trend. In 2025, it significantly advanced to 1635, an increase of about 813 places compared to 2024, with a cumulative forward movement of about 1152 places over the past two years. The enrollment plan for this university in Inner Mongolia for science (physics category) was 40 in 2021, 45 in 2022, 45 in 2023, 45 in 2024, and 40 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 37, a reduction of 3 (-7.5%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class comprehensive university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 34th in 2026, with a stable ranking around 33–34 in recent years, belonging to the mid-tier 985 level. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to a laboratory explosion incident raising campus safety concerns. On Douyin, its comprehensive popularity ranks 23rd out of 106, rated as 'relatively hot', with medium-to-high short video exposure and moderate application attention. No obvious admission cutoff gaps have been recorded. Civil Engineering is A+, Electrical Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, and Landscape Architecture A-, highlighting strong engineering capabilities, with flagship majors like Electrical Engineering and Mechanical Engineering strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation was highly recommended in 2024, Electronic Information/Communication is highly recommended (76.86), Computer Science is recommended (67.8), and popular engineering majors are generally hot. The total number of candidates in the province for the 2026 college entrance exam is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32.5% compared to about 116,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Chongqing University is located in Chongqing (Southwest China), which is geographically distant from Inner Mongolia, with no significant regional preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is about 1.3%–2.5%, representing a normal enrollment scale for an out-of-province university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant forward trend in historical rankings in 2025, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-7.5%), the substantial increase in the total number of candidates in the province (about +32.5%), and the sustained heat of engineering majors, based on the 2025 benchmark of 1635, the reduction in enrollment eases competition but the increase in candidates intensifies it, with the two offsetting each other leading to slightly intensified competition. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1591, with a range of 1352–1830.

- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer and Intelligent Software).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

- Engineering Experimental Class (High-End Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1352–1830, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main direction, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1352), you can aim for flagship majors like the Excellence Program and Electrical Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>1830), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3 with Tier 2 as a reach.
